command_log.command: echo "## Git Stats" && echo "Commits (last 30 days): $(git log --since='30 days ago' --oneline | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Contributors: $(git log --since='30 days ago' --format='%aN' | sort -u | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Branches: $(git branch -a | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Latest tag: $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo 'none')"

echo "## Repo Structure" && echo "Top-level dirs:" && ls -d */ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && echo "Total files: $(find . -type f -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './node_modules/*' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Total dirs: $(find . -type d -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './node_modules/*' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"

bash -c '
set -euo pipefail
WT_REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
source "${WT_REPO_ROOT}/plugin-wheel/skills/wheel-test/lib/runtime.sh"
export WT_RUN_TIMESTAMP=20260410T204957Z
wt_load_run_env
wt_wait_and_record_serial 2 "${WT_REPO_ROOT}/workflows/tests/agent-chain.json" 1775854256
'

for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do
  echo "=== $sf ==="
  jq '{workflow_name, cursor, owner_agent_id, steps: [.steps[]|{type,status}]}' "$sf"
done
echo "--- recent archives ---"
ls -t .wheel/history/success/agent-chain* .wheel/history/failure/agent-chain* 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo "--- full TSV ---"
cat .wheel/logs/.wheel-test-results-20260410T204957Z.tsv
